LanguageData.AM_Counter_Atlas_JewelryA.description: A long-aged display counter decorated with gold borders.
LanguageData.AM_Counter_Atlas_JewelryA.label: ancient golden glass counter
LanguageData.AM_Counter_Atlas_JewelryB.description: Glass display counter decorated with gold borders.
LanguageData.AM_Counter_Atlas_JewelryB.label: ancient golden glass counter
LanguageData.AM_Counter_Atlas_Weapon.label: ancient glass counter
LanguageData.AM_FrontDesk.description: A desk made of metal and stone.
LanguageData.AM_FrontDesk.label: ancient front desk
LanguageData.AM_FrontDeskB.description: A desk made of metal and stone.
LanguageData.AM_FrontDeskB.label: ancient front desk
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete.description: A structure with waterproof layers, commonly found in underground facilities or old buildings.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete.label: ancient facility wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete_HP.descript: A long-aged wall that seems to be destroyed easily.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_AcientConcrete_HP.label: ancient facility wall (weathered)
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete.description: A long-aged reinforced concrete structure, sturdy and nearly indestructible.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete.label: ancient concrete wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete_HP.description: A long-aged structure, can be destroyed with force.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Concrete_HP.label: ancient concrete wall(weathered)
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Glass.description: A long-aged wall composed of fragile glass and metal frames.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_Glass.label: ancient glass curtain wall
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_LoadBearing.description: A long-aged concrete load-bearing wall with thick structural steel reinforcement.
LanguageData.AM_Wall_Atlas_LoadBearing.label: ancient load-bearing concrete walls
